title: Time to make bar association elections a biennial affair?
description: A bar association in India is a voluntary professional body of lawyers dedicated to representing members' interests, providing professional support and maintaining ethical standards. These groups act as unions for advocates in specific courts, offering networking and welfare benefits.For Indians across the world, the month of March marks the end of the financial year. For lawyers, it also marks the end of the term of their respective bar association and the beginning of a new one. Year after yea
